initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT constructors.name, constructors.url
FROM constructors
JOIN constructorStandings ON constructors.constructorId = constructorStandings.constructorId
WHERE constructors.nationality = 'Italian'
ORDER BY constructorStandings.points DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT constructors.name, constructors.url
FROM constructors
JOIN constructorStandings ON constructors.constructorId = constructorStandings.constructorId
WHERE constructors.nationality = 'Italian'
ORDER BY constructorStandings.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT constructors.name, constructors.url
FROM constructors
JOIN constructorStandings ON constructors.constructorId = constructorStandings.constructorId
WHERE constructors.nationality = 'Italian'
ORDER BY constructorStandings.points DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
WHERE c.nationality = 'Italian'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT constructors.name, constructors.url
FROM constructors
JOIN constructorStandings ON constructors.constructorId = constructorStandings.constructorId
WHERE constructors.nationality = 'Italian'
ORDER BY constructorStandings.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT constructors.name, constructors.url
FROM constructors
JOIN constructorStandings ON constructors.constructorId = constructorStandings.constructorId
WHERE constructors.nationality = 'Italian'
ORDER BY constructorStandings.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

candidates.sql:
SELECT c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
WHERE c.nationality = 'Italian'
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality, c.url
ORDER BY MAX(cs.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
WHERE c.nationality = 'Italian'
GROUP BY c.constructorId, c.url
ORDER BY MAX(cs.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;
